picks.title: Campbell Library Grand Reopening
picks.why: Campbell's brand-new public library opens—a rare community milestone worth celebrating on Sat, May 9.

picks.title: 8th Annual International Mother Language Festival: Art & Celebration
picks.why: Annual Mother Language Festival celebrates global cultures through art at San Jose Museum of Art on Sat, May 9.

picks.title: FOPAL Book Sale
picks.why: 70,000 books across three rooms at Palo Alto's Friends Library sale on Sun, May 10—unmissable for readers.

picks.title: Academy of Classical Ballet: The Four Seasons and Peter and the Wolf
picks.why: Spring ballet performances of Vivaldi's Four Seasons and Prokofiev's Peter and the Wolf on Sun, May 10 at Campbell Heritage Theatre.

picks.title: Berryessa Art Festival
picks.why: Berryessa Art Festival's 49th annual edition on Sat, May 9 features thousands of visitors, art, and food.
